blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: Captain Salt leads Fire to victory against Brave. Welsh Fire captain Phil Salt leads from the front as his unbeaten 47 helps them begin the 2026 Hundred season with a six-wicket win against Southern Brave in Southampton.
